title: Crispy Thai Hispi Sweetheart Cabbage Stir-fry
description: A tangy and crispy date-night Thai dish featuring hispi sweetheart cabbage stir-fried with a touch of sweetness to complement its crunch.

ingredients.name: Hispi Sweetheart Cabbage
ingredients.notes: Frozen Hispi Sweetheart Cabbage can be used.

ingredients.name: Garlic
ingredients.notes: Use fresh garlic for maximum flavor.

ingredients.name: Lime Juice
ingredients.notes: Fresh lime juice is recommended for best flavor.

ingredients.name: Sriracha Sauce
ingredients.notes: For added heat, use more or less to taste.

ingredients.name: Coconut Sugar
ingredients.notes: Optional, used for a hint of sweetness.

ingredients.name: Vegetable Oil
ingredients.notes: For frying the cabbage and adding flavor.

instructions: Prepare hispi sweetheart cabbage by slicing it thinly. Rinse under cold water to remove any dirt.
In a small bowl, mix lime juice and Sriracha sauce; set aside.
Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the finely chopped Thai chili peppers and cook until fragrant and slightly softened (about 2 minutes).
Add sliced Hispi Sweetheart Cabbage to the pan and stir-fry for about 5-7 minutes, until they start to turn golden brown.
Stir in the minced garlic and mix well with the cabbage. Pour in the lime-sriracha mixture and cook for an additional minute.
If using coconut sugar, add it near the end of cooking and stir to combine evenly.
